resulting scripts, subprocesses, file changes, and network activity often fall outside framework logs." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="900" x="42" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell internal tool behavior is invisible</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="790" x="150" y="314" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-a3-gap" edge="1" parent="1" source="a3"
